speaker: College Male
text: Did you watch the game last night? That final quarter was unreal.

speaker: Casual Young Man
text: Dude, I was there live. The crowd went absolutely crazy when Thompson hit that buzzer beater.

speaker: Excited Teenager
text: You were there?! I'm so jealous. I watched it at home and almost woke up my whole family screaming.

speaker: College Male
text: Thompson has been on fire all season. If he keeps this up, he's definitely going to the All-Star game.

speaker: Casual Young Man
text: For sure. But honestly I think the real story this season is the defense. They haven't given up more than ninety points in like ten straight games.

speaker: Excited Teenager
text: That's because Coach Rivera changed the whole defensive scheme in November. Watch the film, it's a completely different team.

speaker: Excited Teenager
text: I literally watch every post-game breakdown on YouTube. It's a problem, I know.

speaker: Casual Young Man
text: Ha. We need you at our fantasy league draft then. You're clearly the most qualified person in this group.

speaker: College Male
text: Agreed. Okay, but real talk — do you think they can win the championship this year?

speaker: Casual Young Man
text: Depends on whether Johnson's knee holds up. He went down a little awkwardly in the second quarter last night.

speaker: Excited Teenager
text: I noticed that too! I hope it's nothing serious. Without him in the playoffs they're a totally different team.

speaker: College Male
text: Yeah. Fingers crossed. Anyway, same bar next game?

speaker: Casual Young Man
text: Absolutely. And this time I'm calling the big booth before you guys get there.
